center.name: 新不列顛
center.summary: 新不列顛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Pied cuckoo-dove、Comb-crested jacana、Australasian darter等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |date=1976 |title=Birds of the Plesyumi Area, Central New Britain |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/1367698 |journal=The Condor |volume=78 |issue=3 |pages=370–374 |doi=10.2307/1367698 |jstor=1367698 |issn=0010-5422|url-access=subscription }} It is found in New Britain and Umboi Island in Papua New Guinea.{{Cite book |last=Steadman |first=David W

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australasian darter is found in the lowlands of New Guinea, New Britain, the Moluccas and the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Bismarck fantail (Rhipidura dahli) is a fantail native to the islands New Britain and New Ireland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The buff-faced pygmy parrot (Micropsitta pusio) is a very small green parrot found in subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest in New Britain and New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird occurs in south-eastern Borneo, the southern Philippines, Sulawesi, Moluccas, Lesser Sunda Islands, north and south-east New Guinea, New Britain (Lake Lalili), and northern and eastern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the montane forests on the Papua New Guinean islands of New Britain and Umboi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The only known nest was a simple structure made of twigs, found in May 1930 on a ledge overhanging a stream flowing through rocky terrain on the island of New Britain

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to New Britain, New Ireland, New Hannover and Karkar Island in Papua New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and New Britain

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Britain only

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species occurs in New Guinea and on the island of New Britain in the Bismarck Archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The buff-bellied mannikin (Lonchura melaena), also known as the sooty munia or Bismarck munia, is a species of estrildid finch found in New Britain and Buka Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Bismarck Archipelago in Papua New Guinea, where it occurs in New Britain, New Ireland and a number of smaller islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: "guariae" Coates, 1990 }} The hooded mannikin or hooded munia (Lonchura spectabilis), also known as the New Britain mannikin or Sclater's mannikin, is a species of estrildid finch found in New Britain and New Guinea
